title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules and six moves for successfully building projects with Claude Code, derived from Y Combinator's leadership principles. The framework emphasizes what to build versus what not to build, and positions structured project selection as critical before starting any Claude Code initiative.
